Apple___Apple_scab.description: The Apple plant is showing symptoms of Apple scab. This is a common disease affecting Apple crops that can reduce yield if left untreated.
Apple___Apple_scab.treatment:
1. Remove and destroy infected plant parts immediately.
2. Apply appropriate fungicides or bactericides labeled for Apple scab on Apple.
3. Ensure good air circulation around the plants.
Apple___Apple_scab.prevention:
1. Practice crop rotation.
2. Use disease-resistant varieties if available.
3. Avoid overhead watering to keep foliage dry.
4. Sanitize garden tools regularly.
